title: Pyrex Glass Baking Tray 350x260x20mm
features: Hygienic and resistant to scratches - cut directly into the dish with no risk of scratches
Glass transparency - check on the progress of your cooking; dishwasher safe
Suitable for extreme temperatures from -40°C to + 300°C
BPA free material that doesn't retain stains or odours
description: Product Description Pyrex, a committed French brand! At Pyrex, we are committed to a free and uninhibited style of cooking, free from codes of perfection. For over 100 years, our Pyrex cookware and storage containers have been inspired by a love of French cuisine. Our commitment is to develop and produce healthy and durable glass products in our French factory, suitable for a wide range of uses! Previous page A collection for those with a sweet tooth! Pyrex Moulds, the essential reference in pastry-making Scratch resistant Can be cut directly inside the dish without damaging it Dishwasher safe Hygienic material that won't accumulate stains or odours Easy to wash Cook and reheat Oven and microwave safe Extreme heat resistance (up to 300°C) Easy to use Wavy edges to hold pie edges in place Suitable for refrigerator and freezer Next page 1 Pyrex tins 2 Scratch resistant 3 Easy to wash 4 Cook and reheat 5 Easy to use Discover the bakeware range ! A COMMITMENT MADE TO LAST Sustainable products We are committed to bringing the highest quality cookware to every home in the world. Preserving our environment Our aim is to continually reduce our CO2 emissions, improve waste management and minimise our footprint on the planet. French manufacturing Pyrex glass has been made in France since 1970, symbolising the excellence of the French glass industry thanks to unrivalled expertise. Stop food waste! At Pyrex, we fight food waste with the conviction that food that is better preserved and consumed is also food that is thrown away less. Previous page Next page
